free_text: Gamma ray production cross sections from the
bombardment of Mg, Al, Si, Ca and Fe with medium
32.5, 42.1 and 64.5 MeV were produced via the
7Li(p,n)7Be reaction in the lithium target using
proton beam from 76 inch cyclotron at the University
of California Davis Crocker Nuclear Laboratory (CNL).
